title: Heart Like a Hand Grenade
original_title: Green Day: Heart Like a Hand Grenade
overview: More than 10 years after the release of Green Day's American Idiot, the 2015 Rock and Roll Hall of Fame Inductees present this time capsule rock doc that takes us inside the making of their award-winning punk rock opera.
